strings.level.1.title: The Forest Awakening
strings.level.1.description: A gentle forest stirs with life. Help the woodland creatures by solving simple addition puzzles!
strings.level.1.voice: Welcome to The Forest Awakening! Add small numbers to wake up the magic of the forest.
strings.level.2.title: River Crossing
strings.level.2.description: A rushing river blocks your path. Build a bridge by solving addition problems up to 18!
strings.level.2.voice: Welcome to River Crossing! Use addition to gather the stones you need to cross the river.
strings.level.3.title: Mountain Trail
strings.level.3.description: The path up the mountain is steep. Add your way to the top with numbers up to 30!
strings.level.3.voice: Welcome to Mountain Trail! Climb higher by solving addition challenges with bigger numbers.
strings.level.4.title: Sky Kingdom
strings.level.4.description: Soar above the clouds! The Sky Kingdom needs your help with numbers up to 40.
strings.level.4.voice: Welcome to the Sky Kingdom! Solve sky-high addition problems to unlock floating islands.
strings.level.5.title: Dragon's Peak
strings.level.5.description: Face the ultimate addition challenge at Dragon's Peak! Numbers can reach 100. Can you tame the dragon?
strings.level.5.voice: Welcome to Dragon's Peak! Only the greatest math heroes can solve these big addition problems.
strings.level.6.title: Cave of Shadows
strings.level.6.description: Shadows hide the answers in this mysterious cave. Use subtraction to light the way!
strings.level.6.voice: Welcome to the Cave of Shadows! Subtract to find the hidden path through the darkness.
strings.level.7.title: Desert Oasis
strings.level.7.description: The hot desert hides a cool oasis. Subtract your way to fresh water and relief!
strings.level.7.voice: Welcome to the Desert Oasis! Use your subtraction skills to find the hidden water.
strings.level.8.title: Ocean Depths
strings.level.8.description: Dive into the deep blue ocean! Subtract to uncover hidden treasures beneath the waves.
strings.level.8.voice: Welcome to the Ocean Depths! Solve subtraction puzzles to discover the ocean's secrets.
strings.level.9.title: Volcano Island
strings.level.9.description: A rumbling volcano threatens the island. Subtract quickly to cool it down before it erupts!
strings.level.9.voice: Welcome to Volcano Island! Subtract fast and accurately to prevent the volcanic eruption.
strings.level.10.title: Final Fortress
strings.level.10.description: The ultimate challenge awaits at the Final Fortress! Master subtraction with numbers up to 50 to become a MathQuest Champion!
strings.level.10.voice: Welcome to the Final Fortress! Prove your mastery of subtraction to claim the championship!
strings.ui.main_menu.title: MathQuest
strings.ui.main_menu.subtitle: Learn Addition & Subtraction through adventure!
strings.ui.results.title: Level Complete!
